description: Curated cross-type edition equivalence pairs. AoN alternate links connect same-type pages across editions; these pairs connect a transformation whose rules CARRIER changed type across editions (Book of the Dead undead templates vs Monster Core creation-rules families). Emitted into both documents as equivalent_link by pfsrd2/equivalents.py, indexed into the equivalents table, and used by the engine as an edition-resolution fallback after alternates. Hand-curated: there is no AoN data source for these.

equivalents.note: Book of the Dead ghost template (legacy) <-> Monster Core ghost family creation rules (remastered)
Book of the Dead ghoul template (legacy) <-> Monster Core ghoul family creation rules (remastered)
Book of the Dead vampire template (legacy) <-> Monster Core vampire family creation rules (remastered)
